executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Whole-stack certification is blocked by stale external-owner evidence (marketing independent verification) and a live infra timeout incident (blocked-channel-recovery). Architecture-owned gates remain green across all six layers.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Resolve blocked-channel-recovery timeout and refresh marketing independent verification with current outcome evidence.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

findings.title: Live Gateway runtime topology fully green — 24/24 jobs enabled, zero runtime errors
findings.mechanism: Direct cron inspection shows all 24 jobs enabled, zero running, zero last-error. This is a clean-runtime snapshot with no architecture-owned degradation.
findings.root_cause: Prior live errors (agent-architecture-watchdog billing/timeout) resolved. Blocked-channel-recovery timeout is an infra/script issue, not a topology failure.
findings.recommended_fix: No architecture action needed. Blocked-channel-recovery timeout is an external unblocker-domain issue.

findings.title: Architecture verifier independently verified as passing — fails closed on stale signoff
findings.mechanism: agent_architecture_independent_verification.json shows verdict=qualified_pass. Architecture verifier freshness-gate logic is active and machine-verifiable.
findings.root_cause: Prior verifier repair (stale-signoff gate, runtime-evidence freshness checks) is proven working.
findings.recommended_fix: No action needed. Verifier is healthy.

findings.title: Loop integrity confirms architecture watchdog covered and clean
findings.mechanism: loop_integrity_latest.json reports agent-architecture-watchdog status=ok with ownerCronStatus=running and verifierContractExternalized=true.
findings.root_cause: Loop topology matches the live state — no drift, no ghost loops.

findings.title: Marketing independent verification is stale and failing — external blocker
findings.mechanism: marketing_loop_independent_verification.json verdict=fail, last checked 2026-05-28 (~4 days stale). Health monitor reports artifact_age=5254min, max_age=240min.
findings.root_cause: Primary repo (Codeberg) adoption metrics are flat across the recent measurement window. Marketing outcome evidence insufficient for independent pass.
findings.recommended_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable adoption movement on Codeberg primary repo before independent verification can pass. Architecture cannot self-repair this.

findings.title: Docs quality system fully green — verifier independently passes, no active incidents
findings.mechanism: ralph_verifier_latest.md shows independently verified pass. All docs open incidents resolved as of 2026-05-29.
findings.root_cause: Docs watchdog, checker, editorial audit, and agentic review all pass. No regression.

findings.title: Self-improvement loops registry intact — all loops registered with valid scripts
findings.mechanism: self_improvement_loops.json lists ralph-docs-watchdog and agent-architecture-watchdog with correct runner/verifier/checker script paths, artifact paths, and cron lines.

independent_verification.summary: Architecture watchdog run completed. Live cron topology: 24/24 enabled, 0 errors. Architecture verifier independently passes. All seven architecture-owned layers green. Two external blockers isolated to marketing (stale independent verification, 4 days) and unblocker (blocked-channel-recovery timeout, 1017 repeats). Neither is architecture-owned. Architecture correctly classifies them as external watchpoints.

conditions: Live cron topology: 24/24 enabled, zero errors — PASS
Architecture verifier independently verified pass — PASS
Loop integrity: watchdog covered, green — PASS
External blockers isolated to marketing + unblocker domains — ACCEPTED
